shots.title: HarnessAdapter interface + tool name mapping types
shots.notes: HarnessAdapter interface, ToolCategory/ToolNameMap types, TOOL_CATEGORIES constant, CLAUDE_CODE_TOOLS map, adapter registry (register/get/list/detect/clear), resolveToolMatcher utility. 21 tests, all passed first run.

shots.title: Extract ClaudeCodeAdapter from guard.ts + hook.ts
shots.notes: Extracted format functions and installGuards logic into ClaudeCodeAdapter class. guard.ts format functions become thin wrappers delegating to adapter singleton. Added toolCategories field to all 16 built-in guards. 19 tests verifying parity with legacy functions.

shots.title: Refactor hook installation with --harness flag
shots.notes: installGuardHooks() now uses adapter registry: explicit --harness=<id> or auto-detect. Removed installClaudeCodeGuards function. Help text updated with adapter listing. Side-effect imports trigger auto-registration.

shots.title: Build GenericAdapter for shell-based harnesses
shots.notes: GenericAdapter class with JSON output format, guards-manifest.json generation, shell dispatcher script, README.md. detect() always returns true (fallback). 16 tests including file creation and dispatcher preservation.

shots.title: slope roadmap sync CLI command
shots.notes: sync subcommand reads scorecards, maps to RoadmapSprint format with club-to-complexity inference, updates existing sprints (preserves depends_on), adds new ones, --dry-run support. 7 tests.

nutrition.description: Full build + test after every ticket. 1605 tests passing at completion, 0 failing.
5 feature commits, 1:1 ticket-to-commit ratio. All pushed to feat/harness-adapter branch.
63 new tests across 4 test files (harness: 21, claude-code adapter: 19, generic adapter: 16, roadmap sync: 7). All passed on first run.
Adapter extraction maintained 100% backwards compatibility — all existing tests pass without modification. Thin wrapper pattern preserved public API.

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Smooth architectural sprint. The adapter pattern extracted cleanly from guard.ts without any backwards-compat issues. The thin-wrapper approach meant zero changes to existing tests while enabling full extensibility.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: Adapters auto-register on import via side-effect imports. When adding a new adapter, create it in src/core/adapters/, call registerAdapter() at module level, and add a side-effect import in hook.ts. The generic adapter is always the fallback (detect returns true).
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: The dual toolCategories + matcher approach worked well. Guards declare harness-agnostic toolCategories, and resolveToolMatcher() translates them to harness-specific tool names. No need to rewrite matchers per harness.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: CaddyStack integration (S35-S36) — now that we have the adapter framework, adding Cursor, Windsurf, or any new harness is just a new adapter class.

bunker_locations: Side-effect imports (import '../../core/adapters/claude-code.js') are required for auto-registration — forgetting them means adapters won't be found
Generic adapter detect() always returns true — it must be registered last or detectAdapter() skips it correctly via priority logic
yardage_book_updates: src/core/harness.ts: Adapter framework — HarnessAdapter interface, registry, ToolCategory/ToolNameMap, resolveToolMatcher
src/core/adapters/claude-code.ts: ClaudeCodeAdapter — format functions, installGuards (settings.json merge), detect (.claude dir)
src/core/adapters/generic.ts: GenericAdapter — JSON output, guards-manifest.json, shell dispatcher, fallback detect
src/core/guard.ts: Added toolCategories field to GuardDefinition, format functions now delegate to claudeCodeAdapter
src/cli/commands/hook.ts: --harness flag, adapter-based installGuardHooks, side-effect adapter imports
src/cli/commands/roadmap.ts: sync subcommand — scorecardToSprint mapping, club-to-complexity inference, --dry-run
course_management_notes: 5 tickets, par 4, score 4 — par. All shots in_the_hole, 0 hazards, 0 penalties.
Slope 3 — new adapter abstraction layer affecting guard.ts, hook.ts, and new infrastructure.
1225 lines added, 142 removed across 11 files. 6 new source files, 4 new test files.
100% backwards compatibility maintained — all 1542 pre-sprint tests pass unmodified.
